question: Write a Rive converter script that turns a number from Data Binding into a formatted label.
required_concepts: Identify converter scripts as the right place for value transformation
Verify exact protocol method names against source docs before giving production code
red_flags: Suggests changing the bound text manually from runtime code instead of using a converter
Performs external calls or state mutation inside conversion
ideal_answer_shape: Describe editor setup for the bound number and text
Show a concise Luau converter example
Explain how to bind the converter output
